inst✝⁴ : TopologicalSpace α
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : BorelSpace α
μ : Measure α
inst✝¹ : μ.WeaklyRegular
inst✝ : SigmaFinite μ
f : α → ℝ
hf : Integrable f μ
ε : ℝ≥0
εpos : 0 < ↑ε
⊢ ∃ g,
    (∀ (x : α), g x < ↑(f x)) ∧
      UpperSemicontinuous g ∧
        Integrable (fun x => (g x).toReal) μ ∧
          (∀ᵐ (x : α) ∂μ, ⊥ < g x) ∧ ∫ (x : α), f x ∂μ < ∫ (x : α), (g x).toReal ∂μ + ↑ε

            match cmpLE x y with
            | Ordering.lt => (Ordnode.insert x l).balanceL y r
            | Ordering.eq => node sz l x r
            | Ordering.gt => l.balanceR y (Ordnode.insert x r))).Valid

B : Type u_2

x : TotalSpace F E

y✝ : E b✝
inst✝⁵ : AddCommMonoid F

        continuous_toFun := ⋯, continuous_invFun := ⋯ }
      y =
    (↑e' (↑e.symm (b, y))).2
